id.description: A persistent identifier, a unique reference to the organisation

abbreviation.description: Acronym or short name of the organisation

country.description: Country of incorporation or Physical location of the organisation or its coordinating centre in the case of distributed, virtual, and mobile providers.

legalEntity.description: Yes if the organisation is a legal entity. False if it is not (e.g. a project consortium)

legalStatus.description: Legal status of the Organisation. The legal status is usually noted in the registration act/statutes. For independent legal entities (1) - legal status of the Provider. For embedded organisations (2) - legal status of the hosting legal entity.

hostingLegalEntity.description: Name of the organisation/institution legally hosting (housing) the provider/research infrastructure or its coordinating centre. A distinction is made between: (1) research infrastructures that are self-standing and have a defined and distinct legal entity, (2) research infrastructures that are embedded into another institution which is a legal entity (such as a university, a research organisation, etc.). If (1) - name of the research infrastructure, If (2) - name of the hosting organisation.

description.description: A high-level description of the Organisation in fairly non-technical terms, with the vision, mission, objectives, background, experience.

logo.description: Link to the logo/visual identity of the Organisation.

nodePID.description: Node the organisation is contributing to
